pokemon:tyrogue.name: Tyrogue
pokemon:tyrogue.summary: Tyrogue becomes stressed out if it does not get to train every day. When raising this Pokémon, the Trainer must establish and uphold various training methods.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Tyrogue becomes stressed out if it does not get to train every day. When raising this Pokémon, the Trainer must establish and uphold various training methods.
It is famous for its eagerness to fight and always nurses injuries from challenging larger foes.
It is famous for its eagerness to fight and always nurses injuries from challenging larger foes.
To brush up on its fighting skills, it will challenge anyone. It has a very strong com­ petitive spirit.
It is famous for its eagerness to fight and always nurses injuries from challenging larger foes.
TYROGUE become stressed out if they do not get to train every day. When raising this POKéMON, the TRAINER must establish a regular training schedule.
Even though it is small, it can’t be ignored because it will slug any handy target without warning.
It is always bursting with en­ ergy. To make it­ self stronger, it keeps on fighting even if it loses.
It is always bursting with energy. To make itself stronger, it keeps on fighting even if it loses.
It is always bursting with energy. To make itself stronger, it keeps on fighting even if it loses.
Tyrogue becomes stressed out if it does not get to train every day. When raising this Pokémon, the Trainer must establish and uphold various training methods.
It is famous for its eagerness to fight and always nurses injuries from challenging larger foes.

Even though it is small, it can’t be ignored because it will slug any handy target without warning.
Even though it is small, it can't be ignored because it will slug any handy target with­ out warning.
Even though it is small, it can’t be ignored because it will slug any handy target without warning.
It is always bursting with energy. To make itself stronger, it keeps on fighting even if it loses.
It is famous for its eagerness to fight and always nurses injuries from challenging larger foes.
It is famous for its eagerness to fight and always nurses injuries from challenging larger foes.
It is always bursting with energy. To make itself stronger, it keeps on fighting even if it loses.
To brush up on its fighting skills, it will challenge anyone. It has a very strong competitive spirit.

pokemon:hitmonlee.name: Hitmonlee
pokemon:hitmonlee.summary: Hitmonlee’s legs freely contract and stretch. Using these springlike legs, it bowls over foes with devastating kicks. After battle, it rubs down its legs and loosens the muscles to overcome fatigue.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Hitmonlee’s legs freely contract and stretch. Using these springlike legs, it bowls over foes with devastating kicks. After battle, it rubs down its legs and loosens the muscles to overcome fatigue.
Its legs can stretch double. First-time foes are startled by its extensible reach.
Its legs can stretch double. First-time foes are startled by its extensible reach.
When in a hurry, its legs lengthen progressively. It runs smoothly with extra long, loping strides.
It is also called the Kick Master. It uses its elastic legs to execute every known kick.
Its legs can stretch double. First-time foes are startled by its extensible reach.
Its legs freely stretch and contract. Using these springlike limbs, it bowls over foes with devastating kicks. After battle, it rubs down its tired legs.
The legs freely contract and stretch. The stretchy legs allow it to hit a distant foe with a rising kick.
This amazing POKé­ MON has an awesome sense of balance. It can kick in succession from any position.
This amazing Pokémon has an awesome sense of balance. It can kick in succession from any position.
When in a hurry, its legs lengthen progressively. It runs smoothly with extra-long, loping strides.
When kicking, the sole of its foot turns as hard as a diamond on impact and destroys its enemy.
When kicking, the sole of its foot turns as hard as a diamond on impact and destroys its enemy.
Hitmonlee’s legs freely contract and stretch. Using these springlike legs, it bowls over foes with devastating kicks. After battle, it rubs down its legs and loosens the muscles to overcome fatigue.
Its legs can stretch double. First-time foes are startled by its extensible reach.
Its legs can stretch double. First-time foes are startled by its extensible reach.
When in a hurry, its legs lengthen progressively. It runs smoothly with extra long, loping strides.
HITMONLEE’s legs freely contract and stretch. Using these springlike legs, it bowls over foes with devastating kicks. After battle, it rubs down its legs and loosens the muscles to overcome fatigue.
HITMONLEE’s legs freely contract and stretch. Using these springlike legs, it bowls over foes with devastating kicks. After battle, it rubs down its legs and loosens the muscles to overcome fatigue.
The legs freely contract and stretch. The stretchy legs allow it to hit a distant foe with a rising kick.
If it starts kick­ ing repeatedly, both legs will stretch even long­ er to strike a fleeing foe.
If it starts kicking repeatedly, both legs will stretch even longer to strike a fleeing foe.
This amazing Pokémon has an awesome sense of balance. It can kick in succession from any position.
Its legs can stretch double. First-time foes are startled by its extensible reach.
Its legs can stretch double. First-time foes are startled by its extensible reach.
The legs freely contract and stretch. The stretchy legs allow it to hit a distant foe with a rising kick.
If it starts kicking repeatedly, both legs will stretch even longer to strike a fleeing foe.
When kicking, the sole of its foot turns as hard as a diamond on im­ pact and destroys its enemy.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: Hitmonlee’s legs freely contract and stretch. Using these springlike legs, it bowls over foes with devastating kicks. After battle, it rubs down its legs and loosens the muscles to overcome fatigue.
